name: Masseter
description: Tear and chew through enemies with this unusual crankshaft-style greatsword. When wielded by Grendel he is immune to staggers and knockdowns during heavy attacks.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Tear and chew through enemies with this unusual crankshaft-style greatsword. When wielded by Grendel he is immune to staggers and knockdowns during heavy attacks.

components.name: Cryotic
components.description:
Usually found in extreme sub-zero environments, Cryotic instantly freezes anything it contacts.

Location: Excavation Missions on Venus, Earth, Phobos, Europa, and Neptune

components.name: Oxium
components.description:
Oxium is a rare lighter than air alloy of Orokin origin, used in certain Corpus Robotics.

Location: Venus, Jupiter, Mars, Neptune, Pluto, Eris, Europa, and Lua.

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some animation issues with the Mortier Heavy Blade Skin on the Masseter.

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.changes:
*When using Grendel with his signature Masseter, he will be immune from crowd-control procs while doing Heavy Attacks.
It's all you can eat with this collection for the gallant gourmand. Includes Grendel Warframe, Glutt Helm, Masseter Greatsword, Sumbha Syandana and 3-day Credit and Affinity boosters.
